message:
fix(pal): parse meminfo unit suffix instead of assuming kB (M10)

parse_meminfo now reads the actual unit token (kB/mB/gB) from each
/proc/meminfo line rather than blindly multiplying by 1024. Lines
without a unit suffix (e.g. HugePages_Total) use the raw value.

bd-2j8

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
